expectations.text: Subject line starts with 'ci:' in lowercase (no scope like 'ci(workflows):')
expectations.evidence: Subject is 'ci: skip claude-pr-review for dependabot[bot] PRs' — starts with 'ci:' no scope

expectations.text: Subject line is 70 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: 'ci: skip claude-pr-review for dependabot[bot] PRs' = 50 characters

expectations.text: No body generated (single-line CI tweak is self-explanatory)
expectations.evidence: Commit message is subject-only — no body
